docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $950.00 FILED BY SMITH, ERIKA AS TO DEFENDANT HOUSE, TIMOTHY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-22-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-22-2015 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$45.00) SERVED APR-22-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HOUSE, TIMOTHY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-22-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-22-2015 BY CYNTHIA M. LEE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SMITH, ERIKA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOUSE, TIMOTHY $950.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,025.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF SMITH, ERIKA
